_scenario: INCOMPLETE — frozen shrimp food import with missing FDA Prior Notice, no country of origin on invoice, absent ISF elements (importer of record number, manufacturer, ship-to party), no USDA/NMFS documentation, partial B/L with illegible fields
_missing_elements: FDA Prior Notice: mandatory for all imported food under 21 CFR 1.279 — not present
Country of origin: not stated on commercial invoice
Manufacturer / producer: not identified anywhere in documents
Importer of Record number: missing from all documents
Ship-to party: not identified (ISF element 6 missing)
USDA NMFS seafood inspection documentation: absent
HACCP certificate or health certificate from exporting country authority: absent
HTS subheading: only 6-digit provided, 10-digit required for CBP entry
Declared value currency ambiguous — '$' symbol with no currency code
